directives.name: svg
directives.description: Loads an SVG and renders it as an tag pointing to the asset.

directives.name: assets
directives.description: Injects the assets placeholder where scripts and styles will be output.

elements.name: style
elements.description: Captures inline styles to be injected via @assets.

elements.name: script
elements.description: Captures inline scripts to be injected via @assets.
